name: Pancakes (Using Mix #23)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the eggs with a whisk until well mixed.
2. Whisk in the milk and melted butter.
3. Add the pancake mix and stir the batter with a fork or whisk until the dry ingredients are moistened. The mixture will be slightly lumpy.
4. Heat a hot griddle (greased or not, as per manufacturer's instructions). If using an electric griddle or skillet, set to 400°F.
5. Pour about 1/4 cup batter per pancake onto the griddle.
6. Turn the pancakes when bubbles form all over the top and edges appear dry.
7. Continue baking until no more steam rises.
8. Serve immediately.
